message:
fix(fwc): preserve unsupported/planned/offline-only status during workflow binding

The binding-awareness pass could inadvertently promote an unsupported or
planned workflow capsule to "ready" status when a user supplied parameter
bindings, because the status update logic only checked for missing
bindings without considering permanent status classifications.

Add an explicit guard that preserves unsupported, planned, offline-only,
and live-runtime-required statuses even when all required bindings are
present. An unsupported intent like "disable the slack connector"
should remain unsupported regardless of what parameters are bound to it.

Includes two new tests:
- create_preserves_unsupported_capsule_status_for_missing_real_primitive
- bind_does_not_promote_unsupported_capsule_to_ready

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
